title: Aloo Paratha
steps: Boil potatoes until soft, peel them, and mash smoothly without lumps.
Add salt, red chili powder, garam masala, chopped green chili, and coriander. Mix well to make a flavorful filling.
Prepare a soft dough using wheat flour and water. Knead for 5–7 minutes and let it rest for better texture.
Take a dough ball, flatten it slightly, and place 2–3 tbsp filling in the center. Seal edges properly.
Dust lightly with dry flour and roll gently into a 6–7 inch circle without breaking.
Heat a tawa and cook the paratha until bubbles appear, then flip carefully.
Apply butter or ghee on both sides and cook until golden brown and crisp.
Serve hot with curd, pickle, or butter for best taste.

title: Paneer Butter Masala
steps: Heat butter in a pan on medium flame and add basic spices for aroma.
Pour tomato puree and cook until it thickens and releases oil from the sides.
Add cream and mix well to create a smooth, rich gravy.
Add paneer cubes and gently stir without breaking them.
Simmer for 5–7 minutes so flavors blend properly.
Serve hot with naan, roti, or rice.

title: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast bread slices until golden and slightly crisp.
Cut avocado, remove seed, and mash it in a bowl until smooth.
Add salt and lemon juice to enhance flavor and prevent browning.
Spread the avocado mixture evenly over the toast.
Serve immediately while fresh and warm.

title: Grilled Chicken Salad
steps: Season chicken breast with salt and black pepper evenly.
Grill on medium heat for 6–8 minutes per side until fully cooked.
Let it rest for a minute, then slice into thin strips.
Wash and chop lettuce and other vegetables if using.
Combine everything in a bowl and drizzle olive oil.
Toss lightly and serve fresh.

title: Chole Bhature
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight and boil until soft.
Prepare gravy using onion, tomato, and spices, then add chickpeas.
Cook until thick and flavorful.
Prepare dough using maida and curd, rest for 2 hours.
Roll into discs and deep fry until puffed.
Serve hot chole with bhature.

title: Rajma Chawal
steps: Soak rajma overnight and pressure cook until soft.
Prepare gravy using onion, tomato, and spices.
Add cooked rajma and simmer for rich flavor.
Cook rice separately until fluffy.
Serve hot rajma with steamed rice.

title: Masala Dosa
steps: Soak rice and urad dal, grind into smooth batter and ferment overnight.
Prepare potato filling with mustard seeds, curry leaves, onions, and spices.
Spread batter thinly on hot tawa into a crisp dosa.
Add filling in center and fold.
Serve hot with chutney and sambar.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
steps: Cook spaghetti until al dente and reserve some pasta water.
Cook bacon until crispy and add garlic.
Whisk eggs and cheese in a bowl.
Combine hot pasta with bacon, then quickly mix in egg mixture.
Add pasta water if needed for creamy texture.
Serve immediately with extra cheese.

title: Chicken Stir Fry
steps: Slice chicken thinly and marinate with soy sauce and cornstarch.
Heat oil in a wok and sauté garlic.
Add chicken and cook until browned.
Add vegetables and stir fry on high heat.
Cook until vegetables are tender but crisp.
Serve hot with rice or noodles.

title: Veggie Tacos
steps: Warm tortillas on a pan.
Prepare filling by mixing beans, chopped veggies, and lime juice.
Place filling inside tortillas.
Top with avocado slices.
Serve fresh with salsa or sauce.

title: Greek Salad
steps: Wash cucumber and tomatoes thoroughly under running water.
Chop cucumber and tomatoes into medium-sized cubes.
Slice onion thinly for a mild crunch.
Combine all vegetables in a large mixing bowl.
Add olives and crumble feta cheese on top.
Drizzle olive oil evenly and sprinkle oregano.
Toss gently and serve fresh.

title: Chocolate Brownie
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C and grease a baking tray.
Melt chocolate and butter together using double boiler method.
In a bowl, whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy.
Mix melted chocolate into egg mixture slowly.
Add flour and fold gently without overmixing.
Pour batter into tray and spread evenly.
Bake for 25–30 minutes until set.
Cool, cut into squares, and serve.

title: Chicken Biryani
steps: Wash and soak rice for 30 minutes.
Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices for 20 minutes.
Fry sliced onions until golden brown.
Cook chicken mixture until tender and flavorful.
Boil rice until 70% cooked and drain water.
Layer rice and chicken alternately in a pot.
Cover and cook on low heat (dum) for 20 minutes.
Serve hot with raita.

title: Caesar Salad
steps: Wash lettuce leaves and pat dry completely.
Chop into bite-sized pieces and place in a bowl.
Add croutons and grated parmesan cheese.
Pour dressing evenly over the salad.
Toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Serve immediately for best texture.

title: Mango Smoothie
steps: Peel mangoes and cut into small chunks.
Add mango, milk, and sugar into blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour into glasses and serve chilled.

title: Veg Fried Rice
steps: Heat oil in a wok and add chopped garlic.
Stir fry vegetables on high flame for 3–4 minutes.
Add cooked rice and mix well.
Pour soy sauce and toss evenly.
Cook for 2 minutes and serve hot.

title: Pancakes
steps: Mix flour, milk, egg, and sugar into smooth batter.
Heat pan and lightly grease it.
Pour batter and cook until bubbles form.
Flip and cook other side until golden.
Serve with syrup.

title: Fruit Salad
steps: Wash all fruits properly.
Peel and chop into small pieces.
Mix in a bowl and serve fresh.

title: Tomato Soup
steps: Wash and chop tomatoes.
Boil tomatoes until soft.
Blend into smooth puree.
Heat butter and cook puree for 5 minutes.
Serve warm.

title: Banana Shake
steps: Peel banana and cut into pieces.
Blend with milk until smooth.
Serve chilled.

title: Greek Salad
steps: Wash and chop cucumber and tomatoes into bite-size pieces.
Slice olives and cube feta cheese.
Combine everything in a bowl.
Drizzle olive oil and toss gently.
Serve fresh.

title: Fudgy Chocolate Brownies
steps: Melt chocolate and butter together.
Whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy.
Combine melted mixture with eggs.
Fold in flour gently.
Pour into tray and bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.
Let cool before cutting for fudgy texture.

title: Caesar Salad
steps: Wash and chop lettuce.
Add croutons and grated cheese.
Pour dressing and toss well.
Serve immediately.

title: Mango Smoothie
steps: Peel and chop mango.
Blend with milk until smooth.
Serve chilled.

title: Garlic Bread
steps: Crush garlic and mix with butter.
Spread mixture on bread slices.
Toast in oven until golden.
Serve hot.

title: Chicken Biryani
steps: Wash and soak rice for 30 minutes.
Marinate chicken with yogurt and spices.
Fry sliced onions until golden brown.
Cook chicken until tender.
Layer rice and chicken, cook on low heat (dum) for 20 minutes.
Serve hot with raita.

title: Vegetable Soup
steps: Wash and chop vegetables into small pieces.
Boil water and add vegetables.
Add garlic and cook for 10–15 minutes.
Season with salt and serve hot.

title: French Fries
steps: Wash, peel, and cut potatoes into thin strips.
Soak in water for 10 minutes and dry.
Deep fry until golden and crispy.
Sprinkle salt and serve hot.

title: Ice Cream Sundae
steps: Place ice cream scoops in a bowl.
Drizzle chocolate syrup on top.
Sprinkle nuts and serve immediately.

title: Caprese Salad
steps: Wash and slice tomatoes and cheese.
Arrange alternately on a plate.
Add basil leaves on top.
Drizzle olive oil and serve fresh.

title: Sushi Rolls
steps: Wash and cook sushi rice properly.
Slice fish and cucumber into thin strips.
Place nori sheet and spread rice evenly.
Add fillings and roll tightly.
Cut into pieces and serve.

title: Omelette
steps: Crack eggs and whisk properly.
Chop onion finely.
Heat oil in pan and pour egg mixture.
Cook both sides until set.
Serve hot.

title: Chocolate Milkshake
steps: Add all ingredients into blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour into glass and serve chilled.

title: Quinoa Salad
steps: Wash quinoa and cook until fluffy.
Chop vegetables into small pieces.
Mix quinoa with vegetables.
Add olive oil and toss well.
Serve fresh.

title: Cheese Pizza
steps: Spread sauce evenly on pizza base.
Add grated cheese generously.
Bake in oven at 200°C for 15 minutes.
Slice and serve hot.

title: Falafel Wrap
steps: Soak chickpeas overnight and grind coarsely.
Mix garlic, spices, and flour into mixture.
Shape into balls and deep fry until crispy.
Place in wrap with veggies and sauce.
Roll and serve.

title: Beef Burger
steps: Cook beef patty on grill until done.
Toast burger buns lightly.
Assemble with lettuce, cheese, and patty.
Serve hot.

title: Hakka Noodles
steps: Boil noodles and drain properly.
Stir fry vegetables on high heat.
Add noodles and soy sauce.
Mix well and cook for 2 minutes.
Serve hot.

title: Strawberry Cheesecake
steps: Crush biscuits and mix with melted butter.
Press mixture into base and refrigerate.
Prepare cream cheese filling and spread over base.
Top with strawberries.
Chill for few hours before serving.

title: Grilled Salmon
steps: Clean and season salmon with salt and lemon.
Brush with olive oil.
Grill for 10–12 minutes until cooked.
Serve hot.

title: Pancakes
steps: Mix flour, milk, egg, and sugar into batter.
Heat pan and pour batter.
Cook until bubbles form, then flip.
Serve with syrup.

title: Mango Smoothie
steps: Add mango, milk, and honey to blender.
Blend until smooth.
Serve chilled.

title: Spaghetti Bolognese
steps: Cook spaghetti according to instructions.
Cook beef in pan until browned.
Add tomato sauce and simmer.
Mix with pasta and serve.

title: Greek Yogurt Bowl
steps: Add yogurt to bowl.
Top with honey and nuts.
Serve immediately.

title: Tacos
steps: Cook chicken with spices.
Warm tortillas.
Fill with chicken and lettuce.
Fold and serve.

title: Dal Tadka
steps: Cook lentils until soft.
Prepare tadka with garlic and spices.
Mix tadka into dal.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Caesar Salad
steps: Chop lettuce and place in bowl.
Add croutons and dressing.
Toss well and serve.

title: Kadai Paneer
steps: Heat oil and sauté onions and capsicum.
Add tomatoes and cook until soft.
Mix in kadai masala and spices.
Add paneer cubes and cook for 5–7 minutes.
Serve hot with roti or naan.

title: Avocado Toast
steps: Toast the bread slices.
Mash avocado and spread on toast.
Add salt and serve.

title: Nutty Chocolate Brownies
steps: Melt chocolate and butter together.
Mix sugar into the melted mixture.
Add flour and fold gently.
Stir in chopped walnuts.
Pour into tray and bake at 180°C for 25 minutes.
Cool and slice into squares.
